title: Flaky Crunchy Norwegian Flour Flatbread
description: A traditional Norwegian flour flatbread with a flaky, crunchy texture and a comforting taste.

ingredients.name: buttermilk
ingredients.notes: or 3/4 cup milk with 1 tsp white vinegar

instructions: Combine strong white flour, kosher salt, and sugar in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5-7 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rest in a warm place for 1 hour.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat and cook the flatbreads for 1-2 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown and crispy.
Serve the flatbreads warm, with your favorite toppings or fillings.
Freeze any leftover flatbreads for up to 2 months.
